wordplay_note: The distant one — mysterious and ancient
card_description: David Lantano (meaning "Lantano = distant (Italian)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Penultimate Truth*. Mysterious figure who may be immortal and works to end the deception. Name note: The distant one — mysterious and ancient. The immortal witness — someone old enough to remember the truth. First appears in *The Penultimate Truth*.

reference.brief: Mysterious figure who may be immortal and works to end the deception
reference.significance: The immortal witness — someone old enough to remember the truth
